summary: Tested Admin Service-Registry (KI-ROUTER) backend+frontend, Plex image proxy, chat routing with Plex, ForgePilot integration. Found and fixed a critical bug in server.py (gather_context_for_services signature mismatch). All 11 new pytest tests + 15 existing local tests pass. Admin KI-ROUTER tab renders 6 services correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 after 15s when Plex host unreachable (expected in preview env since 192.168.x.x unreachable). Not a 500.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: gather_context_for_services() was defined with 2 args but called with 3 at line 1137, causing HTTP 500 on ANY non-ForgePilot chat message that required a service context (plex, weather, system, homeassistant, casedesk). Added original_message param with default value.

issues: Initial registry fetch can take ~3s in preview; during that window the empty-state message 'Noch keine Dienste geladen – Tab erneut öffnen' is shown instead of a spinner. Recommend adding loading state with isLoading/skeleton.

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/admin/service-registry requires auth (401 without token)
Backend GET /api/admin/service-registry returns merged defaults with is_default/overridden/is_custom/available fields
Backend PUT /api/admin/service-registry/weather saves override; GET shows overridden=true; DELETE resets to default
Backend POST /api/admin/service-registry creates custom testcustom; DELETE removes it
Backend POST rejects default service_id (weather) with 400
Backend POST rejects invalid service_id (with spaces) with 400
Backend PUT rejects empty body with 400
Backend /api/plex/image without path returns 4xx (not 500)
Backend /api/plex/image with invalid path returns 404 (not 500)
Backend /api/chat routed to Plex works (was crashing with 500 before fix) — returns 200
Backend /api/health OK (forgepilot + plex modules load cleanly)
Local: tests/test_forgepilot_integration.py — 6/6 pass
Local: tests/test_plex_context.py — 6/6 pass
Local: tests/test_forgepilot_e2e.py — 3/3 pass
Frontend Admin: KI-ROUTER tab visible, clickable, loads 6 services (weather, system, homeassistant, casedesk, plex, forgepilot)
Frontend Admin: Edit button opens RegistryEditor inline for weather
Frontend Admin: 'NEUEN DIENST' button opens create form (data-testid registry-create-form)
Frontend Admin: DIENSTE tab still exists alongside KI-ROUTER
Frontend /mediathek page loads with no error elements
Frontend Chat page: target-select contains 'Aria AI (Standard)', 'CaseDesk AI', 'ForgePilot' options (data-testid chat-target-select)
action_items: (Optional UX) Add isLoading state to KI-ROUTER tab so users don't see the empty-state text while the registry is being fetched the first time.
(Optional hardening) Consider reducing Plex image proxy timeout from 15s → 5s so /api/plex/image returns 404 faster when Plex is unreachable, avoiding long hangs for thumbnails.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: server.py:1137 called gather_context_for_services(routed_services, msg_lower, message_text) but function signature at line 979 only accepted 2 params. This broke every chat request that routed to plex/weather/system/ha/casedesk with HTTP 500. Fixed by adding original_message parameter (default '').
server.py is 1766 lines — exceeds 700 lines guideline; consider splitting chat/service-registry endpoints into separate modules.

admin_update_service_registry allows upsert even for service_id not in defaults; callers expecting PUT-only-for-overrides should note this also creates custom entries. Consider validation or documentation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin KI-ROUTER, Mediathek, Chat target-select all working)

seed_data_creation: None. Test creates/deletes a transient 'testcustom' service inside test_create_and_delete_custom_service; cleaned up in same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin service-registry fully working with all CRUD + admin auth. Plex and ForgePilot unreachable from preview env (192.168.x.x) — availability=false is expected. The critical server.py signature bug is fixed — ALL chat routing paths (plex, weather, system, HA, CaseDesk, ForgePilot) confirmed working. Plex image proxy returns 404 after ~15s when plex unreachable (not a 500); consider reducing timeout. ForgePilot chat target is visible in /chat target-select dropdown.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA for chat 500: gather_context_for_services() in /app/backend/server.py was declared async def gather_context_for_services(service_ids: list, msg_lower: str) but called at line 1137 with 3 positional args including message_text. Python raised TypeError: takes 2 positional arguments but 3 were given, which FastAPI surfaced as HTTP 500 in chat_route. Reproduction: POST /api/chat {'message':'Wieviele Filme hast du auf Plex?'} as any authenticated user. Mitigation: Added original_message: str = '' parameter with default; already used in plex.build_chat_context(original_message or msg_lower) at line 1069.
